references.key: we introduce layer wise bayes predictors a
references.raw: Risk decomposition via Bayes surrogates (Subsection A.2): In classification settings, labels are discrete, so the observed loss is non-differentiable with respect to embeddings. We introduce layer-wise Bayes predictors a
